steps.action: Seed 120 additional test transactions across Kas, Bank, Gudang modules via sql.js
steps.observed: 127 total pending transactions confirmed in dashboard

steps.action: Load Dashboard Approval page with 127 items

steps.observed: 100 rows displayed, pagination shows 'Halaman 1 dari 2', controls are responsive
Page remained responsive, no freeze detected

steps.action: Seed 45 transactions with created_at set to 48 hours ago
steps.observed: 15 old transactions per module (45 total) inserted with timestamps 48h in the past

steps.action: Restart app and load dashboard, sort by oldest
steps.expected: Overdue badge shown, row background red-tinted
steps.observed: Overdue card shows 45 items. Sorted oldest first shows '48j lalu' for seeded old transactions. Code review confirms bg-red-50 class is applied via isOverdue() check.

assertions.title: Real-Time Updates

steps.action: Code review of DashboardApprovalPage.tsx for polling or WebSocket
steps.expected: Polling interval or WebSocket connection for auto-refresh
steps.observed: No setInterval, polling, or WebSocket usage found in component. Only manual refresh via filter changes triggers reload.

assertions.issues: Dashboard does not auto-refresh when transactions change in other modules. Users must manually change filters or navigate away/back to see updates.

assertions.title: Mobile Responsiveness

steps.expected: Summary cards stack vertically in single column
steps.observed: Screenshot confirms summary cards remain in 2-column grid layout on small screens. Table is horizontally scrollable.

assertions.issues: Summary cards use 'grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4' without 'grid-cols-1' for smallest screens, so they don't stack into a single column on mobile.

assertions.title: Accessibility

steps.action: Test Tab key navigation through dashboard
steps.observed: Sidebar buttons, filters, and action buttons are keyboard accessible via Tab.

steps.action: Check for ARIA labels and color contrast
steps.observed: Basic keyboard navigation verified, but comprehensive WCAG audit (color contrast ratios, ARIA labels audit, screen reader behavior) requires Lighthouse or axe-core, neither of which is available in the testing environment.

assertions.issues: Tool limitation: no Lighthouse/axe-core for automated accessibility scoring.

assertions.title: Error Handling

steps.action: Code review of loadPendingApprovals and loadCounts error handling
steps.expected: Error state UI with retry button and friendly message
steps.observed: Both functions catch errors and only call console.error(). No React error state is set, no retry button rendered, no per-module failure indicator shown.

steps.action: Simulate IPC failure by mocking getKasWithPagination to reject
steps.observed: Page displays loading state indefinitely without any error message or retry option.

assertions.issues: Missing error handling UI in DashboardApprovalPage. Errors are silently logged to console only.

frictions.description: agent-browser fill command timed out on React inputs; required eval-based setter
frictions.resolution: Used document.querySelector + Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor value setter with dispatchEvent

frictions.description: Seeded data went to 04.db but running Electron instance had loaded DBs into memory earlier; changes weren't picked up until app restart
frictions.resolution: Restarted Electron main process after seeding to load updated databases

summary: Round 3 tested 6 assertions. 2 previously-failed assertions now pass after test data seeding (VAL-DASH-011, VAL-DASH-012). 3 assertions remain failed due to unfixed code issues (VAL-DASH-014 missing real-time updates, VAL-DASH-018 mobile grid not stacking, VAL-DASH-020 missing error UI). 1 assertion remains blocked for tool availability (VAL-DASH-019).
